name: Improper Input Validation
description: Product does not validate or incorrectly validates input.
detection_patterns: missing validation on user input fields
remediation_guidance: Validate all input at system boundaries.

name: Path Traversal
description: Use of external input to construct a pathname for restricted directory.
remediation_guidance: Canonicalize paths, validate against allowlist, use chroot.

name: OS Command Injection
description: Constructs OS command with external input.
remediation_guidance: Use subprocess with list args, never shell=True with user input.

name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation.
remediation_guidance: Output encoding, CSP headers, use framework auto-escaping.

name: SQL Injection
description: Improper neutralization of SQL command elements.

name: Code Injection
remediation_guidance: Remove eval, use safe alternatives, sandbox execution.

name: Improper Encoding or Escaping
description: Product does not encode or escape output.
detection_patterns: user content rendered without HTML escaping

name: Exposure of Sensitive Information
description: Product exposes sensitive information to unauthorized actor.
remediation_guidance: Custom error handlers, no debug in production.

name: Error Info Exposure
remediation_guidance: Custom error pages, log internally only.

name: Execution with Unnecessary Privileges
description: Software runs with more privileges than needed.

name: Improper Privilege Management
description: Product does not properly manage privileges.

name: Improper Authentication
description: Actor claims identity not sufficiently proven.
remediation_guidance: Auth middleware on all routes, MFA.

name: Missing Authentication for Critical Function
description: Product does not authenticate for critical function.

name: Improper Restriction of Excessive Auth Attempts
description: No restriction on number of authentication attempts.
detection_patterns: login without rate limit or lockout

name: Use of Broken or Risky Crypto Algorithm
Insufficient Entropy
description: Not enough entropy in random values.

name: Cross-Site Request Forgery
description: No verification that request was intentionally provided.

name: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
description: Product does not control resource allocation.

name: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release
description: Product does not release resources after use.

name: Insertion of Sensitive Info into Log File
remediation_guidance: Sanitize log output, never log secrets.

name: Exposure of Info Through Directory Listing
Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
detection_patterns: XML parser without disabling external entities

name: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key
detection_patterns: user ID from request in DB lookup

name: Allocation of Resources Without Limits
description: Unbounded resource allocation from user input.
remediation_guidance: Max size limits on all collections.

name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
Incorrect Authorization
remediation_guidance: Test auth boundaries, use framework guards.

name: Improper Neutralization of Expression Language Statement
Sensitive Cookie Without HttpOnly Flag
remediation_guidance: Set HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite on all sensitive cookies.

name: Using Known Vulnerable Component
description: Product uses component with known vulnerability.

name: Use of Unmaintained Third Party Components
detection_patterns: package with no updates in 2+ years
